title: Aehr Receives $3.0 Million in Orders for Silicon Carbide Power Semiconductors
text: Aehr Test Systems received $3.0 million in orders to support production test and burn-in of silicon carbide power semiconductors for electric vehicles. The orders reflect early stages of the EV semiconductor transition to silicon carbide technology. Aehr's wafer-level burn-in solutions are critical for ensuring reliability of these advanced power devices. The company emphasized the enormous market opportunity, with silicon carbide expected to represent a significant portion of future automotive semiconductor content. Management highlighted relationships with multiple automotive suppliers and semiconductor manufacturers exploring silicon carbide adoption.
